roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:COURT CONFIRMS PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 08-21-20 IN M11 AT 9AM/D0P/

/CAL:CUST STATUS/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH (A GPS DEVICE, SCRAM DEVICE, OR GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE) AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:CONFIRMED FUTURE PRELIM HRGDATE 08-21-20 IN M11/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:08-21-20/987,2/BAIL:50,000/SAORD/SA2:237 SHIPLEY ST, 736 JONES ST, 775 POST ST, SF/SAORD3//CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE 07-13-20 AND PRELIMINARY HEARING 08-21-20/DOP
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MO PC 1385:LACK OF EVIDENCE/CTORD:THAT THE GPS DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/SATERM/
